crime.value: Double murder of newlywed couple during honeymoon; throats cut with evidence of struggle
crime.quote: A newlywed couple was murdered last weekend, a week into their honeymoon. Their throats were cut

victim.value: Newlywed couple killed during their honeymoon at Mable hotel
victim.quote: A newlywed couple was murdered last weekend, a week into their honeymoon

closed_world.value: Mable hotel where the murders took place
closed_world.quote: They were killed in the Mable hotel

culprit_and_motive.value: Dylan, the protagonist's former lover, committed the murders (motive unclear from excerpt)
culprit_and_motive.quote: your minion shot me and my partner, and then you tried to shoot my boss! Dylan, you've changed.

resolution.value: Dylan is arrested, tried, and sentenced to ten years in prison with bail
resolution.quote: Dylan's trial went by faster than i thought, and he got ten years in prison with bail.

investigator.value: Jenna Tyler, professional investigator working for an agency led by Marco
investigator.quote: I woke up to my phone ringing at three in the morning... said my boss, Marco.

suspect_architecture.value: Single suspect Dylan (ex-lover) with clear motive (jealousy/betrayal), means (sniper/gun), opportunity (hotel access). No differentiated suspect pool or red herrings.
suspect_architecture.quote: Dylan, you've changed...your minion shot me and my partner, and then you tried to shoot my boss!

clue_fairness.value: Poor clue fairness - Dylan's identity revealed suddenly without prior evidence shared with reader. No systematic clue presentation.
clue_fairness.quote: I looked up at the sniper, and i gasped when i saw who it was. It was Dylan

social_world.value: Police agency hierarchy with Marco as boss directing team assignments. Downtown precinct and hotel investigation structure.
social_world.quote: this is the biggest case we have ever taken on, and we need all hands on board for it

reveal_mechanic.value: Visual identification of sniper during shooting - immediate recognition rather than deductive revelation.
reveal_mechanic.quote: I looked up at the sniper, and i gasped when i saw who it was. It was Dylan

investigator_wound.value: Jenna's romantic vulnerability - betrayed by ex-lover Dylan, then struggles with new romance with Marco due to occupational dangers.
investigator_wound.quote: i have hurt too many people, and i don't want to ever have a relationship in fear that my lover would get hurt
